title: hieracium glanduliferum subsp. armerioides
intro: Hieracium glanduliferum subsp. armerioides, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hieracium glanduliferum subsp. armerioides include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Hieracium glanduliferum subsp. armerioides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
